items.label: Light Pain
items.desc: Small painful acts, like slapping, light spanking, etc

items.label: Heavy Pain
items.desc: Heavy painful acts, like punching, kicking, etc

items.label: Genital Torture
items.desc: Regardless of gender, all genitals have the right to be tortured, althought the most known is, of course, {Cock and Ball Torture}[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cock_and_ball_torture]

items.label: Cutting
items.desc: The use of a blade or sharp object to cut into the skin, provoking bleeding

items.label: Scarification
items.desc: The use of a blade to create intentional scars in patterns

items.label: Branding
items.desc: The use of a hot iron to create a specific permanent pattern on the skin, much like a tattoo
